videos.headline: North Dakota State stuns Iowa on last-second field goal
videos.description: North Dakota State stuns No. 13 Iowa with a field goal in the final seconds to win 23-21.

videos.headline: North Dakota State upsets No. 13 Iowa
videos.description: North Dakota State scores 10 points in the final 3:41, including the go-ahead field goal from Cam Pedersen with no time remaining to beat No. 13 Iowa 23-21.

videos.headline: QB hit leads to pick-six for Bison
videos.description: Iowa QB C.J. Beathard is intercepted by MJ Stumpf who returns it 21 yards for a North Dakota State touchdown.

videos.headline: Iowa ties game on 30-yard TD
videos.description: Iowa QB C.J. Beathard connects with Riley McCarron for the 30-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: Bison WR displays tremendous concentration on reception
